title: Harmonic Series Frequency Mapping
description: Maps a gematria word value to the nearest harmonic in a reference harmonic series. Like a musical tuning: the word 'snaps' to the nearest harmonic partial. This reveals which 'note' the word sounds in the harmonic scale.
formula: harmonic_n = base_freq × n; snap_word_to_nearest_harmonic(value) = argmin_n |value/scale - base_freq × n|

harmonic_series.note: The natural harmonic series: fundamental + overtones. Amplitude falls as 1/n.

word_mappings.note: ICHTHYS ≈ 3rd harmonic of LOGOS (near perfect fifth)
Near 3rd harmonic; JESUS ≈ CHRIST in harmonic space

visual_interpretation.harmonic_1: Fundamental — the root frequency, central ring
visual_interpretation.harmonic_2: Octave — doubled frequency, perfect doubling pattern
